---
**[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954da87/2b07114c/9ecc17e/73123d77/1145609228/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/free-obamacare-sticker?source=PT-20170802-MustSeeDS-V1S3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")**

Team,

The fight to save Obamacare was one of the toughest challenges we've faced yet. And even though the odds were stacked against us, grassroots supporters like you gave this fight everything they had -- and together, we won.

[**We want to say thanks for standing with Senate Democrats to save Obamacare. That 's why we'd like to give you a FREE "long live Obamacare" sticker! GET YOURS >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954da87/2b07114c/9ecc17e/73123d77/1145609228/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/free-obamacare-sticker?source=PT-20170802-MustSeeDS-V1S3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

This victory once again proves what we can accomplish when we all raise our voices.

Because you signed petitions, made calls, hosted house parties, attended rallies and donated to keep our ads on the air, millions of Americans will keep their health coverage and live longer. That's something to be tremendously proud of.

**Let 's celebrate! These free stickers won't be around for long, so make sure to claim yours today:**

[**https://www.dscc.org/free-obamacare-sticker**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954da87/2b07114c/9ecc17e/73123d77/1145609228/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/free-obamacare-sticker?source=PT-20170802-MustSeeDS-V1S3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

Thanks again for all you do. We're so grateful to have you on our team.

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,

name: The White House
subject: Jobs are Coming Back
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f6ff8adaa8fc9eee1b6a1df4eb1cdffdbbf0ac9c7c4e6b7692261d4ed3e771873c4b9721cb144f1cec857bdad113447235dca5723e4ecbdf

Today, American Dream Week continues at the White House. President Donald J. Trump is focused on empowering every American to achieve their dreams. Under the President's leadership, optimism is skyrocketing, jobs are coming back, and the economy is revving up.

-------------

Reforming American Immigration for a Strong Economy

On Wednesday, President Donald Trump, alongside U.S. Senators Tom Cotton and David Perdue, announced legislation that would represent the most significant reform to our immigration system in half a century. The Reforming American Immigration for a Strong Economy (RAISE) Act will create a merit-based immigration system that protects our workers, our taxpayers, and our economy.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f6ff8adaa8fc9eee54d553649f5f50601edd43fc93d17370cd5dd0d62c01d8979ad2d224f12b1579327d2d6d1ad265f1182eb5aed53390c4
Watch the video

Vice President Pence in Montenegro

Yesterday, Vice President Pence concluded his trip abroad to Eastern Europe. His last stop was Montenegro, where he made remarks at the Adriatic Charter Summit. “The bond between the United States and Europe has been, is now, and always will be essential -- for we are stronger together than we will ever be apart.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f6ff8adaa8fc9eee6854f0600510a80c894deff8e07e0636e56d50d5cf859acf3af965706acb4f1e38d5117653161839b21c0bc32775706e
Watch the video

Dow Jones Industrial Average Reaches All-time High

On Wednesday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average reached an all-time high of over 22,000, up over 4,000 points since the election. Under the Trump Administration, consumer confidence is soaring.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f6ff8adaa8fc9eeeef758e7ab68eb8d17070fef903d6ab38d3dbd1a034d30f51363e64d78eff0b9f864f57e28fce04eca7b51e9ab2418de7
Read the article

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump, Senator Tom Cotton, and Senator David Perdue | August 2, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)

POTUS and VP TODAY

Today, the President will participate in a Department of Veterans Affairs Telehealth Event at the White House.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f6ff8adaa8fc9eeef56f55a2ad6b9cb492e6e2a8b9e4e14bffa713c43f2738324c0eb02346a0e6192fb777110f66bc016be25c1df609db40
Watch live at 11:30am EST.

Coming Up This Week

Tomorrow, President Trump will join a Hurricane Briefing at FEMA Headquarters. Later in the afternoon, he will participate in an intellectual property event at the White House.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f6ff8adaa8fc9eee75f2532620a8b8ee46adb84a93a6a66169419a70981ce4b4dd15c8f8de1fb725e59c5fa1a314ab2eb7f62ff404183b1e
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f6ff8adaa8fc9eee70b274f27aafc371874a0f6e2df766c4e736adee1615655c4c7f13cc06319b04869423da381df849f535ef784dc4b39b
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4f78d0e7d4beb21cb9948922bd5f2f09259d8994bcf3c7cbcad843f455d6ecc18091fbb18e1aaeeb2448200adbab7c739
Unsubscribe

name: Tom Perez
subject: re: tax breaks for the rich (add your name)
body:
Stand with Democrats against the Republican tax plan
---
**The GOP's tax plan benefits the rich at the expense of working people -- add your name to tell congressional Republicans to create a tax plan that works for every American:

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stop-the-Republican-Tax-Plan1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170803_tp_nd&source=em_20170803_tp_nd")**

Derek --

Trump, Pence, and congressional Republicans just released the outline for their tax plan. I can summarize it for you in five words: tax breaks for the rich.

They propose cutting taxes for billionaires, millionaires, and big corporations -- with nearly half of the tax cuts going to the top one percent, while corporations with offshore profits get a massive $550 billion tax cut.

And hardworking Americans will bear the cost.

This tax scheme is the latest Republican attack on working families, just like their plans to cut health care, Social Security, and education. It's the same kind of top-down economics Republicans have tried for decades, where the rich get richer at the expense of working families.

We've been down that road before, and it got us into the worst recession since the Great Depression -- we can't afford to go back.

**We need real reform that will work for every American, not just those at the top. Add your name: tell Republicans it's time to scrap their tax-cuts-for-the-rich plan and start from scratch:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stop-the-Republican-Tax-Plan1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170803_tp_nd&source=em_20170803_tp_nd")**
Thanks,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523099/4067b0a/334ce204b/7e6cb01b/1283544855/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170803_tp_nd&source=em_20170803_tp_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523099/4067b0a/334ce204b/7e6cb018/1283544855/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170803_tp_nd&source=em_20170803_tp_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523099/4067b0a/334ce204b/7e6cb026/1283544855/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170803_tp_nd&source=em_20170803_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Democrats.org
subject: SATURDAY: Join Ralph Northam for a Virginia Volunteer Summit in Reston
body:
Come see Ralph and learn how you can help VA Democrats win.
---
Derek --

There are less than 100 days until Election Day in Virginia, so we need to use every second we have left to organize and mobilize every single voter.

On Saturday, Virginia Democrats are hosting Volunteer Summits all over the commonwealth. You'll get a chance to hear directly from Ralph Northam about our plan to elect Democrats up and down the ticket and how you can get involved in your community. There's a Volunteer Summit near you in Reston -- can you join us?

**NoVA Volunteer Summit with Ralph Northam**
**When:** Saturday, August 5th at 10:00 a.m.
**Where:** Sunset Hills Montessori School
11180 Ridge Heights Rd
Reston, VA 20191

**[RSVP](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523094/4067b0a/334ffbb1f/7e6cbb45/2994054979/VEsH/ "http://my.democrats.org/NOVA-Volunteer-Summit?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+RSVP&utm_campaign=em_20170803_dnc_nova&source=em_20170803_dnc_nova")**
It's going to take all of us working together to win in November -- so whether you're a veteran canvasser or just getting involved for the first time, we need you to say you're in.

We'll give you all the latest info about the races happening in your area and train you to have the biggest possible impact, and you'll get a chance to hear from Ralph about exactly what's at stake this year.

**[Sign up to join us in Reston on Saturday to learn more about how you can help elect Democrats in November.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523094/4067b0a/334ffbb1f/7e6cbb42/2994054979/VEsE/ "http://my.democrats.org/NOVA-Volunteer-Summit?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Sign+up+to+join+us+in+Reston+on+Saturday&utm_campaign=em_20170803_dnc_nova&source=em_20170803_dnc_nova")**

Thanks,

The Democrats

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: five alarm fire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __ Friend, Last week we witnessed another torrent of alarming developments from President Trump and his White House. We saw more outrageous White House staff turmoil, inappropriate Presidential remarks to the Boy Scouts, the New York Police, and on Twitter, and little evidence that anyone at 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue is adequately focused on the very real threats facing our country including, but not limited to, the deteriorating situation in North Korea. Almost lost in all the noise was the breaking news that President Trump had dictated his son's misleading statements regarding his June 2016 meeting with Russian representatives -- a meeting that we subsequently learned was about Russian interest in helping Trump in his presidential campaign. This is the closest evidence of Presidential involvement in a Russia coverup that we have seen to date. At the same time, the President has repeatedly hinted that he might try to remove the person conducting the investigation into any collusion or coverup -- Special Prosecutor, Robert Mueller. [_**We need to build a firewall between this White House and Special Prosecutor Mueller 's investigation and prevent more Trump firings. Join me in demanding that Republicans help us block any Presidential appointments while the Senate is in recess in August.**_](https://cvanhollen.bsd.net/page/m/2de91bc8/70cdc2ba/4696544a/397c0a0/3653674736/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stop-trump-s-obstruction?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+We+need+to+build+a+firewall+between+this&utm_campaign=em080217&source=em080217")
Trump and his surrogates have been openly attacking special prosecutor Robert Mueller -- a lifelong Republican and former Director of the FBI -- painting him as tainted by partisanship despite all evidence to the contrary. When it became clear that these smear tactics were gaining no traction, Trump began to go after his own Attorney General for recusing himself from the investigation and eliminating any possibility of using his position to interfere on behalf of the President. Time and time again, President Trump has made it perfectly clear that he has no qualms about firing people to thwart investigations into his misdeeds. We cannot afford to underestimate the actions he is prepared to take to stop this inquiry. [_**Join me in calling on my colleagues in the House and Senate to protect Robert Mueller from White House intervention and allow the investigation to continue >>**_](https://cvanhollen.bsd.net/page/m/2de91bc8/70cdc2ba/4696544a/397c0a1/3653674736/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stop-trump-s-obstruction?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Join+me+in+calling+on+my+colleagues+in+t&utm_campaign=em080217&source=em080217")
Chris Van Hollen
U.S. Senator
---

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: [PETITION] Stand up to the NRA
body:
#
Team --
We have a serious problem in Florida.
As gun violence continues to plague our state, our politicians have refused to commit to any real reform. They make a big show of going on the news, offering thoughts and prayers, but take no action to even attempt to prevent future tragedies. **My Republican opponent even bragged about being an NRA Sellout. It 's disturbing.**
You deserve to know where I stand on gun reform, so I'll tell it to you straight: I'm against campus carry, for an assault weapons ban, and for closing gun show loopholes.
I don't buckle under pressure or threats from the NRA and the powerful gun lobby. Instead, I stand up and fight. I'm the only candidate for Florida Governor who has had the guts to take on the gun lobby in court -- and win.
[**Today, I 'm asking you to stand with me as we fight for commonsense gun reform. Will you add your name to our petition?**](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32df/9e00690/4c42a072/24036d00/790936733/VEsH/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/gunlobby")
It doesn't matter if other politicians aren't willing to stand alongside me in this fight, as long as I have you. Together, we're going to stand up to the NRA and make our state a safer place.
Thank you for everything.
Bring it home,
Andrew

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32df/9e00690/4c42a072/24036d03/790936733/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-august2017?refcode=em20170803-nra")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32df/9e00690/4c42a072/24036d02/790936733/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32df/9e00690/4c42a072/24036d05/790936733/VEsC/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32df/9e00690/4c42a072/24036d04/790936733/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")
